location: Inside Gaol Cave, Caelid — the entrance is sealed behind an imp statue requiring 2 Stonesword Keys. Past the lever that unlocks the cell doors, drop down and enter the first opened cell on the north side; the shield lies on a corpse alongside the Old Fang curved sword.

source.name: Corpse in unlocked cell, Gaol Cave

tactics: Bring 2 Stonesword Keys before heading here — the entrance seal won't open without them.
The lever near the entrance unlocks several cells at once, and the Pillory Shield's cell also contains the Old Fang curved sword — grab both while inside.
Gaol Cave itself is fairly low-threat once past the sealed door, even though the surrounding Caelid region is dangerous for low-level characters.
lore: A wooden pillory once used to shackle and publicly punish serious criminals, crudely repurposed as a shield — sturdy enough to block with, but really just a makeshift tool rather than proper war gear.

builds.name: Budget Strength tank shield
builds.why: Solid raw block stats for only 10 Strength make it a cheap, thematic off-hand for a tanky early Strength build exploring Caelid.
